effects.effect: Add 1 [Bird] or FIRE Vivosaur from your Deck to your Hand.

effects.name: Amazing Squi Entrance!
effects.effect: After this Vivosaur is played: apply Excite to a Vivosaur and charge 1 [Bird] Vivosaur from your Discard Pile.

effects.name: Burning Wave
effects.effect: You can return this Vivosaur to your hand, then play a non-Fire [Bird] Vivosaur from your Hand.
